_comment: Plugins the v2 substrate depends on. switch-infra.sh status reports each one's enable state against ~/.claude (read-only); the operator installs/enables via Claude Code's /plugin command (Claude Code owns plugin enablement — the substrate never mutates ~/.claude/settings.json enabledPlugins directly). Pins record the marketplace + the version validated against this substrate generation.

plugins.provides_note: Claude Code namespaces plugin commands as <plugin>:<command>; the short /ralph-loop form also resolves.
plugins.why: Bounded, test-verifiable grind (get-the-suite-green, mechanical migrations, lint). The official Ralph Wiggum Stop-hook loop — adopted, not hand-built (findings-v1 §8). The /loop-task wrapper enforces a max-iterations cap because ralph-loop defaults to UNLIMITED (--max-iterations 0).
plugins.install_hint: Run /plugin in Claude Code -> install ralph-loop from claude-plugins-official, or enable ralph-loop@claude-plugins-official in ~/.claude/settings.json enabledPlugins.
